stemHtml: In the evening around sunset, during your final approach, you have wind from the west, and there is haze near the ground. Which of the following statements is correct about visibility in the last phases of the approach?

options.a: The sun is at a low position so it deteriorates visibility even more.
options.b: Visibility deteriorates in the northern hemisphere but improves in the southern hemisphere.
options.c: The blinding effect of the sun is negligible.
options.d: The blinding effect of the sun will be reduced by haze.
